# selectedFunctionalUnit

**Instance Property**

The currently selected functional unit on the scanner.

## Declaration

```swift
var selectedFunctionalUnit: ICScannerFunctionalUnit { get }
```

## Selecting a Functional Unit

- **availableFunctionalUnitTypes**: An array of functional unit types available on this scanner.
- **requestSelect(_:)**: Requests to select a functional unit on the scanner.
- **ICScannerFunctionalUnitType**: The types of scanner functional units.
- **ICScannerFunctionalUnitState**: Flags to indicate the state of the scanner functional unit.
